allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: complete CRM restoration phases 1-5 and 8

Implemented comprehensive fixes and enhancements across critical modules:

Phase 1-3 \(Infrastructure & Core\):
- Add ErrorBoundary for crash handling
- Implement lazy loading with React.Suspense
- Optimize dashboard performance with database-level aggregation
- Remove unused LiveChat module
- Fix sidebar navigation order
- Connect global search to real Supabase data with debouncing
- Create comprehensive taxonomy.ts with business constants
- Update types.ts with missing Lead, Property, Visit fields

Phase 4 \(Properties\):
- Fix mobile tab scrolling with scrollbar-hide utility
- Refactor PropertyCard \(clickable, remove extra buttons\)
- Implement real favorite toggle functionality
- Add skeleton loaders for better UX

Phase 5 \(Leads\):
- Fix detail panel blur bug \(proper z-index layering\)
- Create LeadFiltersPanel with 12 comprehensive filter sections
- Implement chat message saving to Supabase database
- Add Enter key support for sending messages

Phase 8 \(Reports\):
- Fix mobile tabs scrolling for all devices
- Create reportsService.ts with real data fetching for 5 dashboards
- Connect all dashboard tabs to live Supabase data \(Leads, Sales, Rentals, Properties, Captación\)
- Implement dynamic CSV export with actual dashboard data

All modules now use real database queries instead of mock data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
merge: integrate restoration phases with remote changes

Resolved conflicts by keeping restoration work \(phases 1-5 and 8\) which includes:
- ErrorBoundary and lazy loading
- Comprehensive taxonomy system
- Properties module enhancements
- Leads module with advanced filters and chat
- Reports module with real Supabase data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
